title: Agreement for the Partner Testing Point in Iraq
Future of Safety Consultancy for the MHRA
description:
The Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency requires consultancy to help set the Agency’s internal roadmap for the
future state vigilance systems.
The Deliverables are as follows:
• Written minutes and notes from the Lightbox session, including follow up actions.
• Strategic narrative document, including vision and outline of initial Strategic Shifts, with the defining outcomes for each.
• Strategic shifts definition document, providing non-exhaustive examples of the risks, barriers,

title: Contract for the Provision of Additional Learning Needs (ALN) Holiday Childcare Support – Summer Holiday Pilot.
description: Provide a pilot service during the summer school holidays to assess and allocate additional support for children of full-time school age with emerging or identified Additional Learning Needs (ALN) to enable their attendance at childcare.  Enabling parent/carers to work, attend education or participate in training.
